zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte是William Dolte的女兒，於大約1475年出生在英國賀特福爾利可曼斯沃斯。她於1495年與Robert Baldwin在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1565年3月12日在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte是William Dolte的女儿，于大约1475年出生在英国賀特福爾利可曼斯沃斯。她于1495年与Robert Baldwin在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1565年3月12日在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte was born about 1475, in Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of William Dolte. She married Robert Baldwin in 1495, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 12 March 1565, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte est née environ 1475, à Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, fille de William Dolte. Elle a épousé Robert Baldwin en 1495, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1565, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte wurde um 1475 in Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England, als Tochter von William Dolte geboren. Sie hat 1495 in Buckinghamshire, England Robert Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. März 1565 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte è nata il circa 1475 nel Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England come figlia di William Dolte. Lei sposato Robert Baldwin nel 1495, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 12 marzo 1565, nel Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア

ja.Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントン
ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolteは約1475年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリクマンスウオルスでWilliam Dolteの娘として生まれた。1495年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでRobert Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1565年3月12日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte(은)는 대략 1475년 영국 허트퍼드실르 릭먼스워스에서 William Dolte의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Robert Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 3월 12일 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra filha de William Dolte. Ela casou-se com Robert Baldwin em 1495, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1565, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte родилась около 1475 г. в местности риккмансворт, хиртфордшир, Англия. Её отца звали William Dolte. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Baldwin в 1495 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 12 марта 1565 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Dolte nació aproximadamente 1475, en Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra como hija de William Dolte. Se casó con Robert Baldwin en 1495, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1565, en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
